title: WD-40 Multi Use Lubricant Spray 300ml 6-Pack, Wide and Narrow Smart Straw, Multipurpose WD40 Spray Lubricant for Maintenance, Water Displacement, and Rust Protection on Gears, Threads, and Hinges
features: 5-in-1 Protection Formula Six-Pack: Penetrates stuck parts, lubricates moving components, provides corrosion and rust protection for metal, while displacing moisture and cleaning surfaces, making WD40 multi use spray your complete solution.

Smart Straw Precision Control x6: Flip up for precision stream reaching deep into tight spaces or flip down for wide lubricant spray coverage, with permanently attached straws on all 6 cans you'll always have perfect spray oil control.

Cleans Without Attracting Dirt: Unlike ordinary maintenance spray, our formula removes grime while actively repelling dust buildup, making it the perfect squeaky door oil that keeps hinges clean plus essential bike lubricant.

6x 300ml Home Distribution Pack: Deploy this anti rust spray for metal throughout your property with dedicated cans for kitchen, garage, shed, and vehicles while this multipurpose lubricating spray handles every maintenance task.

Trusted Toolbox Essential Since 1953: Professional-grade light lubricant proven across 2000+ documented uses, and our original water resistant lubricant spray formula protects in temperatures from -45°C to 150°C for reliable performance.

Not For Specialist Tasks: While excellent for general maintenance, this isn't a dedicated rust remover spray, heavy penetrating spray, bike chain oil, chain cleaner, or brake component lubricant; choose WD-40 Specialist for those needs.
